texto: And when all of the flourless chocolate cakes & chocolate mousse or ganache cakes have come and gone, there will still be nothing like a fudgy brownie, dry & crackled on top, moist & dense within, with a glass of cold milk.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Richard Sax: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “And when all of the flourless chocolate cakes & chocolate mousse or ganache cakes have come and g…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, dessert, food pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de food e indulgence.
